title: Bug Zapper Indoor, 4 Pack Fly Trap Zapper Mosquito Killer Lamp, Electric Mosquito Zapper with UV Lamps, Insect Pest Killer for Indoor Moths, Flies, Mosquitoes
bullet_points: 【High quality】The updated protective cover has a very high light transmittance. Attracts insects with high light output and kill those insects through the electric shock of the Fly Trap. can effectively destroy all kinds of irritating flies. Such as mosquitoes, moths, fruit flies, mosquitoes, etc.
【Quiet operation】Just plug it into the socket and press the button, and Electric Fly Zapper Killer will start to work quietly. It provides a quiet environment so you can work and sleep quietly.

【Easy to use & Clean】Plug in and wait. For best results, place the traps in areas where flying insects are often active. To clean dead mosquitoes, make sure that the device is separated from an outlet, and then use one a handkerchief or a small brush, to remove dead insects.

【Safety and non-toxic】Mosquito killer made of environmentally friendly material. No smell, no chemicals, no toxic or radiative. It is environmentally friendly and safe for pregnant women, children and animals.

【Widespread Application】4 Pack Fly Trap Zapper, Covers over 200 Sq.Ft. Use anywhere there is a plug, effortlessly eliminate flying fly in any area. ideal for places where pesticides cannot be sprayed, such as kitchens, restaurants, hospitals, supermarkets, offices, schools.
